title: Boebert and Sheehy prepping bills to approve Trump ballroom after dinner shooting
description: Congressional Republicans are preparing bills to grant approval for President Donald Trump‘s ballroom after the correspondents’ dinner shooting sparked serious security concerns for him and his Cabinet. Sen. Tim Sheehy (R-MT) and Rep. Lauren Boebert (R-CO) both announced on Sunday they will introduce bills that would give congressional approval for the ballroom. Sheehy framed the […]

title: Trump says he 'wasn't worried' during Washington press dinner shooting
description: CBS News, the BBC's US partner, reports the suspect wrote a document saying he wanted to target Trump administration officials. He is due in court on Monday.

title: Lakers fall to Kevin Durant-less Rockets in Game 4 for 1st loss in playoff series

title: Kevin Durant Goes Viral for Taunting Deandre Ayton After Ejection

title: Victor Wembanyama calls out NBA for ‘very disappointing’ handling of concussion protocol
description: The Spurs took a 3-1 series lead with a 114-93 win over the Blazers on Sunday night, but was clearly frustrated with the league’s concussion protocol during a postgame interview with Malika Andrews.
